goals: Discover available unit conversion categories relevant to outdoor activities
Convert trail distance from miles to kilometers for planning a hike
Convert temperature from Fahrenheit to Celsius for weather planning
Convert speed from mph to km/h for cycling activities

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and practical outdoor lover who enjoys planning hikes and nature excursions. Prefers clear, useful information for enjoying the trails around Boone.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about outdoor activities and trail measurements but is not familiar with metric units or conversion tools. Needs straightforward conversions to plan outdoor activities.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted all needed measurements for outdoor activity planning in Boone.
